title: Fiducial Dictionary IR Contract
description: Declarative, normalized, and topologically complete representation of a fiducial marker dictionary.

payload_length.description: The exact number of bits in the code (e.g., 36 or 41). This dictates the mask size and must perfectly match the length of the topological sampling array.

minimum_hamming_distance.description: The mathematical guarantee of the family. Minimum Hamming distance between any two codes in the dictionary.

dictionary_size.description: The number of base codes, acting as a checksum to ensure no codes were dropped during ingestion.

canonical_sampling_points.description: An array of (X, Y) coordinate tuples in a continuous 2D space [-1.0, 1.0], representing the spatial center of every bit module to be sampled.

base_codes.description: The Topologically Aligned Base Codes (Rotation 0). Bit 0 of the stored code must perfectly correspond to Index 0 of the Topological Sampling Array.

items.description: Codes must be stored as uppercase Hexadecimal strings.
